workflow_name: Customer Renewal Email -> Forecast Impact + Path
user_message: Can you extract the pipeline hygiene from this support ticket for Evergreen Solutions? We had a deep-dive last month -- need the follow-up.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Samantha Okafor <samantha.okafor@evergreensol.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-16 08:45 EST
Subject: Re: Re: pipeline hygiene Timeline

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about pipeline hygiene. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
To: Samantha Okafor <samantha.okafor@evergreensol.com>
Date: 2024-02-16 08:54 EST
Subject: Re: pipeline hygiene Discussion - Next Steps

Just checking in on the pipeline hygiene proposal. Our IT Director is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Samantha Okafor <samantha.okafor@evergreensol.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-07 09:57 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Evergreen Solutions pipeline hygiene

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with pipeline hygiene. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Evergreen Solutions: the current vendor contract has a 90-day exit clause we need to plan around

required_artifacts: path forward with MACC/funding options if applicable

usability_anchors: Score 5: Complete, well-structured output matching the Customer Renewal Email -> Forecast Impact + Path template with all required artifacts present and actionable
Score 3: Output covers main requirements but missing one or two secondary artifacts or lacking specificity
Score 1: Output is generic, missing key artifacts, or fails to address the specific request
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct pipeline hygiene decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
